build.buildCommand: cd backend && pip install -r requirements.txt && python manage.py collectstatic --noinput 2>/dev/null || true

deploy.startCommand: sh -c 'cd backend && for i in 1 2 3 4 5; do python manage.py migrate --noinput 2>/dev/null && break || (echo "Attempt $i: Waiting for database..."; sleep 5); done; gunicorn config.wsgi:application --bind 0.0.0.0:$PORT --workers 3 --timeout 120'
